phases.name: Adapter Architecture
phases.notes: Router, registry, canonical schema constant, base adapter class, dry-run flag

phases.name: Format Adapters — All Formats (CSV/XLSX/XLE/JSON)
phases.notes: All adapters built together: csv_adapter (PEINP + ECCC), xlsx_adapter, xle_adapter, json_adapter (Licor)

phases.name: Pipeline Integration
phases.notes: Wire adapters into cleaning.py: concat → dedup → resample → impute → FWI. Single SSOT output.

phases.name: Stanhope Validation
phases.notes: Compare ECCC reference (Stanhope) to local stations. Analysis phase.

phases.name: QA/QC Reporting
phases.notes: Wire qa_qc.py into pipeline, generate report artifact

phases.name: E2E Validation
phases.notes: Full run, all tests pass, coverage report, zero unprocessed files

phases.name: Cross-Station Variable Imputation (RH, Wind, Temp)
phases.notes: MSC GeoMet API donor data, vapor pressure continuity, dew-point fallback, wind height correction, spatial temp proxy, quality flag audit trail.

phases.name: Dual-Mode FWI Pipeline (Compliant + Extended)
phases.notes: Van Wagner compliant noon-only FWI mode alongside existing hourly extended mode. zoneinfo for DST. Default lat 46.4N.

phases.name: Wagner Hourly: Fix Extended Mode (Van Wagner 1977)
phases.notes: Replace broken hourly FFMC (daily eqs ×24) with canonical Van Wagner 1977 hourly FFMC from cffdrs. DMC/DC go daily-only. Spec: docs/specs/012-wagner-hourly.md

phases.name: QA/QC Report Expansion — Dual-Mode Diagnostics
phases.notes: Pre/post imputation missingness, FWI mode in reports, compliant mode diagnostics, FWI value stats, mode-specific filenames, per-stage row counts

phases.name: Chain Break Root Cause Attribution
phases.notes: Classify chain breaks as startup vs cascade. Scan backwards to find original missing input. Zero unknowns.

phases.name: Analysis Notebook Delivery
phases.notes: Delete stale notebooks. Rewrite analysis.ipynb with FWI mode awareness, chain break visualization, QA/QC report ingestion, mode comparison. Fix QA/QC hourly bug. Conclusion left blank for user.
